## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] CI / Release / Tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual validation completed

## UI changes

- [ ] No UI changes
- [ ] UI changes included screenshots or recordings

## Notes for reviewers

- Areas that need special attention:
- Risks or follow-up items:

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior changed
- [ ] I checked for security or Electron-specific impact
